CustomField.description: Interval based on Primary Unit and will be used for MR calculation. Event Interval is used if Customize checbox is not checked
CustomField.formula:
IF(leaseworks__Interval_Customized__c=false, leaseworks__Maintenance_Program_Event__r.leaseworks__Primary_Unit_Interval__c,
IF(leaseworks__Primary_Unit__c ="Hours", leaseworks__Interval_2_Hours__c, IF(leaseworks__Primary_Unit__c ="Cycles", leaseworks__Interval_2_Cycles__c , IF(leaseworks__Primary_Unit__c="Months", leaseworks__Interval_2_Months__c,null))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Interval based on Primary Unit and will be used for MR calculation Event Interval is used if Customize Interval checkbox is not checked
CustomField.label: Primary Unit Interval
